final_score.summary: Strong end-to-end delivery with reliable execution quality, minor consistency and hardening gaps remaining.

skills.evidence: Resolved high-priority defects and converged on actionable fixes quickly.
Implemented API robustness patterns including pagination and safer response behavior.
UI is mostly coherent with improved loading/error/empty states and reusable components.
Coverage quality improved, especially around list pagination and key regression paths.
Baseline CI checks exist; opportunities remain for stricter quality gates and matrix expansion.
BOM cleanup and recurrence prevention controls demonstrate strong engineering discipline.
README and environment setup are improved and easier for new contributors.
Architecture choices are pragmatic and support iterative scaling across agents/services.

skill_radar_analysis.interpretation: Performance is well-balanced across delivery, reliability, and maintainability, with strongest outcomes in problem solving and code hygiene.

strengths: High-priority issue resolution is fast and practical, reducing user-facing risk.
Good balance between feature velocity and stability protections (tests + safer API behavior).
Solid engineering hygiene practices, including prevention mechanisms not just one-off fixes.
Documentation quality supports smoother onboarding and reproducible local setup.
weaknesses: CI depth is still moderate; quality gates can miss edge regressions under broader environments.
Frontend consistency is improved but still uneven in a few cross-page interactions.
Observability and production diagnostics could be stronger for faster incident triage.

improvement_recommendations.recommendation: Expand CI pipeline to include lint + test + build matrices and enforce required checks before merge.
improvement_recommendations.expected_impact: Lower regression rate and more predictable release quality.

improvement_recommendations.recommendation: Standardize frontend state handling patterns (loading/error/empty) in shared UI wrappers.
improvement_recommendations.expected_impact: More consistent UX and reduced page-level implementation drift.

improvement_recommendations.recommendation: Strengthen observability with structured logging, request correlation IDs, and focused dashboard alerts.
improvement_recommendations.expected_impact: Faster debugging and improved production reliability.

improvement_recommendations.recommendation: Add contract tests for core API payloads and pagination behavior across all list endpoints.
improvement_recommendations.expected_impact: Improved compatibility confidence for frontend and integrations.

improvement_recommendations.recommendation: Introduce periodic architecture review checkpoints tied to milestone exits.
improvement_recommendations.expected_impact: Sustained system clarity as scope and team size grow.

outcomes: Create alert thresholds for core flows
